'''hashobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zada|zada]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zada|zada]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hashobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæshebeth|hæshebeth]] || [[word:hæshebej|hæshebej]] || [[word:hæshebesh|hæshebesh]] || [[word:hæshebe|hæshebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hashoshoboth|hashoshoboth]] || [[word:hashoshoboj|hashoshoboj]] || [[word:hashoshobosh|hashoshobosh]] || [[word:hashoshobo|hashoshobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hashoboth|hashoboth]] || [[word:hashoboj|hashoboj]] || [[word:hashobosh|hashobosh]] || [[word:hashobo|hashobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hashofboth|hashofboth]] || [[word:hashofboj|hashofboj]] || [[word:hashofbosh|hashofbosh]] || [[word:hashofbof|hashofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hashobotho|hashobotho]] || [[word:hashobojo|hashobojo]] || [[word:hashobosho|hashobosho]] || [[word:hashoboko|hashoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hashoboth|hashoboth]] || [[word:hashoboj|hashoboj]] || [[word:hashobosh|hashobosh]] || [[word:hashobo|hashobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hashobothol|hashobothol]] || [[word:hashobojol|hashobojol]] || [[word:hashoboshol|hashoboshol]] || [[word:hashobokol|hashobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hashobothotho|hashobothotho]] || [[word:hashobojojo|hashobojojo]] || [[word:hashoboshosho|hashoboshosho]] || [[word:hashoboko|hashoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hashobothon|hashobothon]] || [[word:hashobojon|hashobojon]] || [[word:hashoboshon|hashoboshon]] || [[word:hashobokon|hashobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hashobothoro|hashobothoro]] || [[word:hashobojoro|hashobojoro]] || [[word:hashoboshoro|hashoboshoro]] || [[word:hashobokoro|hashobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
